---
title: "I Want To Believe"
author: "Katie Press"
date: 2021-01-01
categories: ["R"]
featured: false
draft: true
banner: ""
tags: ["Text Analysis", "X-Files"]
output: 
  blogdown::html_page:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, show=TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(janitor)
library(lubridate)
library(ggiraph)
library(extrafont)
library(tidytext)
```

```{r eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
ep_text <- readRDS("~/Desktop/blog/content/post/ep_text.RDS")
```


Hello, this is a test post. Now let's look at some data. 

```{r}
data(mtcars)

mtcars

```
